commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 02 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with superior performance across all metrics, particularly its minimal Amihud ILLIQ of 0.0020 and competitive roll spread of 1.0390%. Conversely, London Stock Exchange trails significantly with ILLIQ of 0.1343—67 times higher than NYSE—and elevated spreads, suggesting notably constrained trading conditions. Notably, Nasdaq 100's paradoxically low ILLIQ (0.0035) contrasts sharply with its substantially wider roll spread (1.6894%), indicating potential microstructure complexities deserving further investigation.
